project_type: Vanilla JS single-page app with Firebase/Firestore backend
build_system: None - static files served directly. No bundler or transpiler.
build_command: node --check modules.js && node --check core.js && node --check absensi-ijef.js
test_command: node --check modules.js && node --check core.js && node --check absensi-ijef.js
verification_instructions: Run node --check on all JS files to confirm no syntax errors. Verify with grep that the comparison table is wrapped in hasAccess(3) check.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - static files with inline Firebase SDK from CDN
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external package installs possible. Validation limited to AST/syntax checks.
contribution_requirements: Direct edits to JS files. No PR template or linting config.
key_patterns: hasAccess(3) is used to gate admin/manager+ features. Portal users (staff/leader) use functions prefixed with renderPortal*. The grade system uses getUserGrade() to fetch current user grade, resolveGradeKey() to normalize, getGradeConfig() for benefits, getGradePeraturan() for rules.
relevant_files: modules.js (lines 4551-4566: comparison table in loadSPPDProsedur that must be hidden from non-admin)
modules.js (lines 3475-3495: renderPortalPeraturan - already correctly shows only user's grade)
directory_structure: Single directory with index.html, core.js (auth/routing), modules.js (all module renderers), absensi-ijef.js (attendance), disc-test.html/js (personality test), recruitment.js
